title: jasione humilis var. fallax
intro: Jasione humilis var. fallax, also known as the fallax or fallax heath, is a variety of the Jasione humilis plant, a flowering plant in the bellflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. It is believed to provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, as well as potential anti-cancer and antiviral properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety for human consumption have not been extensively scientifically proven.
